acceptance_checks: Both artifacts present with exact filenames and listed in manifest.
Markdown includes verbatim packet keys and exact policy/exception quotes per event.
Containment comparison table present with computed totals matching the script.
iam_regression_tests.yaml parses and reports >=10 tests; each test includes controlling rule/policy references and covers all required boundaries.
Both artifacts present with exact filenames and listed in manifest.
Markdown includes verbatim packet keys and exact policy/exception quotes per event.
Containment comparison table present with computed totals matching the script.
iam_regression_tests.yaml parses and reports >=10 tests; each test includes controlling rule/policy references and covers all required boundaries.

planned_changes: PC1 Packaging: Ensure iam_regression_tests.yaml is written to artifacts and included in produced_deliverable_items and artifact_refs; echo both artifact filenames and SHA256 hashes in final_message.txt.
PC2 Packet fidelity header: Add a top-of-report block with verbatim packet keys and values (compromised_subject, token_iat, token_exp) derived directly from packet text.
PC3 Event matrix traceability: For E1-E6, add an inline quote of the exact controlling policy/exception clause (policy name, statement/condition) and rule IDs (e.g., R1/R2/R3).
PC4 Containment table: Insert a small comparison table showing at least two feasible containment sets, each with total impact minutes and computed residual severity.
PC5 Allowed-but-unobserved math: Display the explicit formula (weight  0.35) next to each potential exposure and state why it is allowed by the packet but unobserved.

PC6 Regression suite: Confirm >=10 deterministic tests (keep existing 14 if available), each with subject, federation conditions, action, resource, expected allow/deny, and exact controlling rule/policy citation; cover all stated boundaries.
PC7 Pre-submit checks: Add a local script/step to parse YAML (using available runtime), count tests, and verify required boundary coverage; fail early if counts or keys are missing.
PC8 Grounding pass: Review the markdown and tests to ensure all statements and field names are directly grounded in packet text; remove any claims that are not supported.
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Make the regression test artifact visible to graders and tighten packet fidelity/traceability in the markdown while keeping analysis intact.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Strong markdown analysis (event matrix, exposure scoring, containment rationale) but the regression test artifact was not included in the deliverables manifest presented to graders/verifiers. Also, top-of-report packet key labels can be tightened to verbatim field names to improve packet fidelity. Add exact policy/exception clause citations per event and make the containment minimization explicit with a small comparison table.
